name: Amay Varghese
subject: Dubai-Based Game Developer Exploring Opportunities
body:
Hi Amay Varghese,

I hope you're doing well.

I came across your work as CEO at Scapegoat Games, and what genuinely resonates with me is the company's commitment to pushing the boundaries of gaming through creative storytelling and technological innovation. The way Scapegoat Games blends art and technology to create immersive experiences is truly inspiring, and I appreciate the emphasis on community engagement and player interaction.

As a game developer and experience designer based in Dubai, I have been focusing on Unity, XR, and real-time interactive systems to craft unique and engaging experiences. I'm also exploring the potential of AI-driven interactive experiences, particularly in the context of world models and tooling trends, to further enhance the gaming landscape. My expertise in Unreal Engine 5, Pixel Streaming, and WebGL has allowed me to develop innovative solutions for various clients, including experiential activations for Virgin Megastore, UFC, and the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix.

Given your background in leading Scapegoat Games, I am reaching out to explore potential opportunities at your company or with teams that share similar visions and values. I believe my skills and experience could be a great fit for a team that prioritizes creativity, technology, and innovation in the gaming and immersive tech spaces.


I've shared my portfolio and résumé below for context:
Portfolio: https://amayvarghese.com
Résumé: Attached

I would appreciate the chance to discuss my application and how I can contribute to Scapegoat Games' continued success. Would you be available for a brief 10-15 minute conversation to provide guidance on positioning myself for relevant roles?

Thank you for your time — I truly appreciate it.

Best regards,
Amay Varghese
